events.title: FOMC Meeting Minutes (Powell's Final Meeting)
events.impact: Details on rate path under new Chair Warsh. Market expects 3.50-3.75% held. Hawkish skew after April hot CPI could shock bonds and equities.
events.why_it_matters: Directional signal for all holdings. Hawkish minutes could spark rate selloff, hit SPY/QQQ and speculative names hardest. Dovish tone lifts everything.
events.watch_for: SPY, QQQ, DXY, VIX, 2Y yield, 10Y yield
